The text presents various research papers on AI threats in the maritime sector. One of the papers that caught my attention is "Detecting maritime GPS spoofing attacks based on NMEA sentence integrity monitoring" by Spravil et al. (2023).

**Attack Mechanism:**
The paper discusses GPS spoofing attacks, which occur when an attacker sends false GPS signals to a vessel's GPS receiver, making it believe it is at a different location than it actually is. This can have serious consequences, such as disrupting navigation, causing accidents, or even compromising the safety of passengers and crew.
